description: CompositionBlack T-shirt for men, has an upper body made of 100% polyester and lower body made of 92% polyester and 8% spandex, has a round neck, short raglan sleeves with mesh panels under the armholes extending down the sides and back, grey line across the chest and nike swoosh on the left chestFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanLine dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis T-shirt from nike is perfect for your running sessions. Engineered with Dri-Fit technology that wicks away sweat even on the hottest of days, it's sure to give you exemplary comfort and become your favourite running tee. Pair it with track pants and running shoes
